rationale.engineering: Typed dataclasses, deterministic rendering, focused CLI surface, and no runtime dependencies.
rationale.evidence: Includes deterministic demo JSON/Markdown/HTML, compare outputs, tests, and release validation.
rationale.product: Clear CLI asset with bounded static research workflow and public package metadata.
rationale.risk: Strong research-only boundaries with no live data, broker access, orders, or advice.
rationale.runnable: Stdlib-only commands, examples, demo artifacts, tests, selfcheck, and privacy scan.
rationale.showcase: Demo packet, compare packet, review doc, and agent skill show the intended workflow.
rationale.user_value: Maps local catalysts to thesis claims, exposure, warnings, and human review prompts.
